AddFileDependencies.name: AddFileDependencies
AddFileDependencies.description: Load this module in a CMake project with:

AndroidTestUtilities.name: AndroidTestUtilities
AndroidTestUtilities.description: This module provides a command to create a test that pushes data needed for testing an Android device behavior onto a connected Android device.

BundleUtilities.name: BundleUtilities
BundleUtilities.description: This module provides utility commands for assembling standalone, bundle-style applications with CMake, such as macOS .app bundles or similar directory-based application bundles on other operating systems.

CheckCCompilerFlag.name: CheckCCompilerFlag
CheckCCompilerFlag.description: This module provides a command to check whether the C compiler supports a given flag.

CheckCompilerFlag.name: CheckCompilerFlag
CheckCompilerFlag.description: This module provides a command to check whether the compiler supports a given flag.

CheckCSourceCompiles.name: CheckCSourceCompiles
CheckCSourceCompiles.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C source can be built.

CheckCSourceRuns.name: CheckCSourceRuns
CheckCSourceRuns.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C source can be built and run.

CheckCXXCompilerFlag.name: CheckCXXCompilerFlag
CheckCXXCompilerFlag.description: This module provides a command to check whether the C++ compiler supports a given flag.

CheckCXXSourceCompiles.name: CheckCXXSourceCompiles
CheckCXXSourceCompiles.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C++ source can be built.

CheckCXXSourceRuns.name: CheckCXXSourceRuns
CheckCXXSourceRuns.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C++ source can be built and run.

CheckCXXSymbolExists.name: CheckCXXSymbolExists
CheckCXXSymbolExists.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C++ symbol exists.

CheckFortranCompilerFlag.name: CheckFortranCompilerFlag
CheckFortranCompilerFlag.description: This module provides a command to check whether the Fortran compiler supports a given flag.

CheckFortranFunctionExists.name: CheckFortranFunctionExists
CheckFortranFunctionExists.description: This module provides a command to check whether a Fortran function exists.

CheckFortranSourceCompiles.name: CheckFortranSourceCompiles
CheckFortranSourceCompiles.description: This module provides a command to check whether a Fortran source can be built.

CheckFortranSourceRuns.name: CheckFortranSourceRuns
CheckFortranSourceRuns.description: This module provides a command to check whether a Fortran source can be built and run.

CheckFunctionExists.name: CheckFunctionExists
CheckFunctionExists.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C function exists.

CheckIncludeFile.name: CheckIncludeFile
CheckIncludeFile.description: This module provides a command to check C header file.

CheckIncludeFileCXX.name: CheckIncludeFileCXX
CheckIncludeFileCXX.description: This module provides a command to check a C++ header file.

CheckIncludeFiles.name: CheckIncludeFiles
CheckIncludeFiles.description: This module provides a command to check one or more C/C++ header files.

CheckIPOSupported.name: CheckIPOSupported
CheckIPOSupported.description: This module provides a command to check whether the compiler supports interprocedural optimization (IPO/LTO).

CheckLanguage.name: CheckLanguage
CheckLanguage.description: This module provides a command to check whether a language can be enabled using the enable_language or project commands.

CheckLibraryExists.name: CheckLibraryExists
CheckLibraryExists.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C library exists.

CheckLinkerFlag.name: CheckLinkerFlag
CheckLinkerFlag.description: This module provides a command to check whether a given link flag is supported by the compiler.

CheckOBJCCompilerFlag.name: CheckOBJCCompilerFlag
CheckOBJCCompilerFlag.description: This module provides a command to check whether the Objective-C compiler supports a given flag.

CheckOBJCSourceCompiles.name: CheckOBJCSourceCompiles
CheckOBJCSourceCompiles.description: This module provides a command to check whether an Objective-C source can be built.

CheckOBJCSourceRuns.name: CheckOBJCSourceRuns
CheckOBJCSourceRuns.description: This module provides a command to check whether an Objective-C source can be built and run.

CheckOBJCXXCompilerFlag.name: CheckOBJCXXCompilerFlag
CheckOBJCXXCompilerFlag.description: This module provides a command to check whether the Objective-C++ compiler supports a given flag.

CheckOBJCXXSourceCompiles.name: CheckOBJCXXSourceCompiles
CheckOBJCXXSourceCompiles.description: This module provides a command to check whether an Objective-C++ source can be built.

CheckOBJCXXSourceRuns.name: CheckOBJCXXSourceRuns
CheckOBJCXXSourceRuns.description: This module provides a command to check whether an Objective-C++ source can be built and run.

CheckPIESupported.name: CheckPIESupported
CheckPIESupported.description: This module provides a command to check whether the linker supports Position Independent Code (PIE) or No Position Independent Code (NO_PIE) for executables.

CheckPrototypeDefinition.name: CheckPrototypeDefinition
CheckPrototypeDefinition.description: This module provides a command to check if a C function has the expected prototype.

CheckSourceCompiles.name: CheckSourceCompiles
CheckSourceCompiles.description: This module provides a command that checks whether a source code can be built for a given language.

CheckSourceRuns.name: CheckSourceRuns
CheckSourceRuns.description: This module provides a command to check whether a source code can be built and run.

CheckStructHasMember.name: CheckStructHasMember
CheckStructHasMember.description: This module provides a command to check whether a struct or class has a specified member variable.

CheckSymbolExists.name: CheckSymbolExists
CheckSymbolExists.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C symbol exists.

CheckTypeSize.name: CheckTypeSize
CheckTypeSize.description: This module provides a command to check the size of a C/C++ type or expression.

CheckVariableExists.name: CheckVariableExists
CheckVariableExists.description: This module provides a command to check whether a C variable exists.

CMakeAddFortranSubdirectory.name: CMakeAddFortranSubdirectory
CMakeAddFortranSubdirectory.description: This module provides a command to add a Fortran project located in a subdirectory.

CMakeBackwardCompatibilityCXX.name: CMakeBackwardCompatibilityCXX
CMakeBackwardCompatibilityCXX.description: This module defines several backward compatibility cache variables for the CXX language to support early C++ (pre-C++98, ANSI C++).

CMakeDependentOption.name: CMakeDependentOption
CMakeDependentOption.description: This module provides a command to define boolean options whose availability and default values depend on specified conditions or other options. This helps maintain a clean configuration interface by only displaying options that are relevant to the current settings.

CMakeDetermineVSServicePack.name: CMakeDetermineVSServicePack
CMakeDetermineVSServicePack.description: This module provides a command to determine the installed Visual Studio service pack version for Visual Studio 2012 and earlier.

CMakeExpandImportedTargets.name: CMakeExpandImportedTargets
CMakeExpandImportedTargets.description: Load this module in a CMake project with:

CMakeFindDependencyMacro.name: CMakeFindDependencyMacro
CMakeFindDependencyMacro.description: This module provides a command implemented as a macro that finds dependency for a package.

CMakeFindFrameworks.name: CMakeFindFrameworks
CMakeFindFrameworks.description: helper module to find OSX frameworks

CMakeFindPackageMode.name: CMakeFindPackageMode
CMakeFindPackageMode.description: This module is executed by cmake when invoked with the --find-package <Find-Package Tool Mode> option to locate the requested package.

CMakeForceCompiler.name: CMakeForceCompiler
CMakeForceCompiler.description: Load this module in a CMake toolchain file:

CMakeGraphVizOptions.name: CMakeGraphVizOptions
CMakeGraphVizOptions.description: This module is not intended to be included in CMake projects directly. It once contained the information for using Graphviz in CMake. For Graphviz usage in CMake refer to the cmake --graphviz.

CMakePackageConfigHelpers.name: CMakePackageConfigHelpers
CMakePackageConfigHelpers.description: This module provides helper commands for creating config files <Libraries providing Config-file packages> that can be included by other projects to find and use a package.

CMakeParseArguments.name: CMakeParseArguments
CMakeParseArguments.description: This module once implemented the cmake_parse_arguments command that is now implemented natively by CMake. It is now an empty placeholder for compatibility with projects that include it to get the command from CMake 3.4 and lower.

CMakePrintHelpers.name: CMakePrintHelpers
CMakePrintHelpers.description: This module provides convenience commands, primarily intended for debugging, to print the values of properties and variables.

CMakePrintSystemInformation.name: CMakePrintSystemInformation
CMakePrintSystemInformation.description: This module can be used for diagnostics to print system information.

CMakePushCheckState.name: CMakePushCheckState
CMakePushCheckState.description: This module provides commands for managing the state of variables that influence how various CMake check commands (e.g., check_symbol_exists, etc.) are performed.

CMakeVerifyManifest.name: CMakeVerifyManifest
CMakeVerifyManifest.description: This module is intended to be used in command-line mode using the cmake -P  to verify that embedded manifests and side-by-side manifests for a project match.

CPack.name: CPack
CPack.description: This module configures generators for binary installers and source packages.

CPackArchive.description: The documentation for the CPack Archive generator has moved here: CPack Archive Generator

CPackBundle.name: CPackBundle

CPackFreeBSD.description: The documentation for the CPack FreeBSD generator has moved here: CPack FreeBSD Generator

CPackIFW.name: CPackIFW
CPackIFW.description: This module looks for the location of the command-line utilities supplied with the Qt Installer Framework (QtIFW).

CPackIFWConfigureFile.name: CPackIFWConfigureFile
CPackIFWConfigureFile.description: This module provides a command similar to configure_file for configuring file templates prepared in QtIFW/SDK/Creator style.

CPackNSIS.name: CPackNSIS
CPackNSIS.description: The documentation for the CPack NSIS generator has moved here: CPack NSIS Generator

CPackWIX.name: CPackWIX

CSharpUtilities.name: CSharpUtilities
CSharpUtilities.description: This utility module is intended to simplify the configuration of CSharp/.NET targets and provides a collection of commands for managing CSharp targets with Visual Studio Generators, version 2010 and newer.

CTest.name: CTest
CTest.description: Configure a project for testing with CTest/CDash

CTestCoverageCollectGCOV.name: CTestCoverageCollectGCOV
CTestCoverageCollectGCOV.description: This module is intended for use in CTest dashboard scripts and provides a command to generate a tarball containing code coverage reports.

CTestScriptMode.name: CTestScriptMode
CTestScriptMode.description: This module is not intended to be included or invoked directly by project code. It is internally used by CTest running in script mode (-S) to determine current system. For usage details refer to the ctest -S.

CTestUseLaunchers.name: CTestUseLaunchers
CTestUseLaunchers.description: This module sets the RULE_LAUNCH_* global properties when the CTEST_USE_LAUNCHERS variable is set to a true-like value (e.g., ON):

Dart.name: Dart
Dart.description: Configure a project for testing with CTest or old Dart Tcl Client

DeployQt4.name: DeployQt4
DeployQt4.description: This module provides a collection of CMake utility commands useful for assembling and deploying standalone Qt4 executables.

Documentation.name: Documentation
Documentation.description: This module provides support for the VTK documentation framework. It relies on several tools (Doxygen, Perl, etc).

ExternalData.name: ExternalData
ExternalData.description: This module provides commands to manage data files stored outside source tree.

ExternalProject.name: ExternalProject
ExternalProject.description: This module provides commands to download and build external projects as part of CMake build phase.

FeatureSummary.name: FeatureSummary
FeatureSummary.description: This module provides commands for generating a summary of enabled/disabled features.

FetchContent.name: FetchContent
FetchContent.description: This module provides commands to populate content at configure time or as part of the calling script.

FindSDL_ttf.description: Finds the SDL_ttf library that provides support for rendering text with TrueType fonts in SDL (Simple DirectMedia Layer) applications:

FindSelfPackers.name: FindSelfPackers
FindSelfPackers.description: Finds UPX, the Ultimate Packer for eXecutables:

FindSquish.name: FindSquish
FindSquish.description: Finds Squish, a cross-platform automated GUI testing framework for applications built on various GUI technologies:

FindSubversion.name: FindSubversion
FindSubversion.description: Finds a Subversion command-line client executable (svn) and provides commands for extracting information from a Subversion working copy:

FindSWIG.name: FindSWIG
FindSWIG.description: Finds the installed Simplified Wrapper and Interface Generator (SWIG) executable and determines its version:

FindTCL.name: FindTCL
FindTCL.description: Finds the Tcl (Tool Command Language), dynamic programming language:

FindTclsh.name: FindTclsh
FindTclsh.description: Finds the Tcl shell command-line executable (tclsh), which includes the Tcl (Tool Command Language) interpreter:

FindTclStub.name: FindTclStub
FindTclStub.description: Finds the Tcl Stub Library, which is used for building version-independent Tcl extensions:

FindThreads.name: FindThreads
FindThreads.description: Finds and determines the thread library of the system for multithreading support:

FindUnixCommands.name: FindUnixCommands
FindUnixCommands.description: Finds Unix commands bash, cp, gzip, mv, rm, and tar, including the ones from Cygwin or MSYS:

FindVulkan.name: FindVulkan
FindVulkan.description: Finds Vulkan, a low-overhead, cross-platform 3D graphics and computing API, along with related development tools typically provided by the Vulkan SDK:

FindWget.name: FindWget
FindWget.description: This module finds the wget command-line tool for retrieving content from web servers:

FindWish.name: FindWish
FindWish.description: Finds wish, a simple windowing shell command-line executable:

FindwxWidgets.name: FindwxWidgets
FindwxWidgets.description: Finds a wxWidgets installation and provides usage requirements for usage in projects:

FindwxWindows.name: FindwxWindows
FindwxWindows.description: Finds the wxWidgets (formerly known as wxWindows) installation and determines the locations of its include directories and libraries, as well as the name of the library:

FindX11.name: FindX11
FindX11.description: Finds the X11 installation on Unix-like systems:

FindXalanC.name: FindXalanC
FindXalanC.description: Finds the Apache Xalan-C++ XSL transform processor headers and libraries:

FindXCTest.name: FindXCTest
FindXCTest.description: Finds the XCTest framework for writing unit tests in Xcode projects:

FindXercesC.name: FindXercesC
FindXercesC.description: Finds the Apache Xerces-C++ validating XML parser headers and libraries:

FindXMLRPC.name: FindXMLRPC
FindXMLRPC.description: Finds the native XML-RPC library for C and C++:

FindZLIB.name: FindZLIB
FindZLIB.description: Finds the native zlib data compression library:

FortranCInterface.name: FortranCInterface
FortranCInterface.description: This module provides variables and commands to detect Fortran/C Interface.

GenerateExportHeader.name: GenerateExportHeader
GenerateExportHeader.description: This module provides commands for generating a header file containing preprocessor macro definitions to control C/C++ symbol visibility.

GetPrerequisites.name: GetPrerequisites
GetPrerequisites.description: This module provides commands to analyze and list the dependencies (prerequisites) of executable or shared library files. These commands list the shared libraries (.dll, .dylib, or .so files) required by an executable or shared library.

GNUInstallDirs.name: GNUInstallDirs
GNUInstallDirs.description: This module defines the installation directory variables according to the GNU Coding Standards and provides a command to compute installation-related absolute paths.

GoogleTest.name: GoogleTest
GoogleTest.description: This module provides commands to help use the Google Test infrastructure.

InstallRequiredSystemLibraries.name: InstallRequiredSystemLibraries
InstallRequiredSystemLibraries.description: This module searches for compiler-provided system runtime libraries and adds installation rules for them.

MacroAddFileDependencies.name: MacroAddFileDependencies
MacroAddFileDependencies.description: Load this module in a CMake project with:

ProcessorCount.name: ProcessorCount
ProcessorCount.description: This module provides a command to determine the number of processors/cores.

SelectLibraryConfigurations.name: SelectLibraryConfigurations
SelectLibraryConfigurations.description: This module provides a command to automatically set library variables when package is available with multiple Build Configurations. It is intended for use in Find Modules implementing find_package(<PackageName>) calls.

SquishTestScript.name: SquishTestScript
SquishTestScript.description: This module is not intended to be included directly in a CMake project. It is an internal CMake test script used to launch GUI tests with Squish. For usage details, refer to the squish_add_test command documentation in the FindSquish module.

TestBigEndian.name: TestBigEndian
TestBigEndian.description: This module provides a command to check the endianness (byte order) of the target architecture.

TestCXXAcceptsFlag.name: TestCXXAcceptsFlag
TestCXXAcceptsFlag.description: This module provides a command to test whether the C++ (CXX) compiler supports specific flags.

TestForANSIForScope.name: TestForANSIForScope
TestForANSIForScope.description: This module checks whether the CXX compiler restricts the scope of variables declared in a for-init-statement to the loop body.

TestForANSIStreamHeaders.name: TestForANSIStreamHeaders
TestForANSIStreamHeaders.description: This module checks whether the CXX compiler supports standard library headers without the .h extension (e.g. <iostream>).

TestForSSTREAM.name: TestForSSTREAM
TestForSSTREAM.description: This module checks whether the C++ standard header <sstream> exists and functions correctly.

TestForSTDNamespace.name: TestForSTDNamespace
TestForSTDNamespace.description: This module checks whether the CXX compiler supports the std namespace for the C++ Standard Library.

UseEcos.name: UseEcos
UseEcos.description: This module defines variables and provides commands required to build an eCos application.

UseJava.name: UseJava
UseJava.description: This file provides support for Java. It is assumed that FindJava has already been loaded. See FindJava for information on how to load Java into your CMake project.

UseJavaClassFilelist.name: UseJavaClassFilelist
UseJavaClassFilelist.description: This module was previously documented by mistake and was never meant for direct inclusion by project code. See the UseJava module.

UseJavaSymlinks.name: UseJavaSymlinks
UseJavaSymlinks.description: This module was previously documented by mistake and was never meant for direct inclusion by project code. See the UseJava module.

UsePkgConfig.name: UsePkgConfig
UsePkgConfig.description: Load this module in a CMake project with:

UseSWIG.name: UseSWIG
UseSWIG.description: This module provides support for SWIG. It is assumed that FindSWIG module has already been loaded.

UsewxWidgets.name: UsewxWidgets
UsewxWidgets.description: This module serves as a convenience wrapper for using the wxWidgets library (formerly known as wxWindows) and propagates its usage requirements, such as library directories, include directories, and compiler flags, into the current directory scope for use by targets.

Use_wxWindows.name: Use_wxWindows
Use_wxWindows.description: This module serves as a convenience wrapper for finding the wxWidgets library (formerly known as wxWindows) and propagates its usage requirements, such as libraries, include directories, and compiler flags, into the current directory scope for use by targets.

WriteBasicConfigVersionFile.name: WriteBasicConfigVersionFile
WriteBasicConfigVersionFile.description: Deprecated since version 3.0: Use the identical command write_basic_package_version_file() from module CMakePackageConfigHelpers.

WriteCompilerDetectionHeader.name: WriteCompilerDetectionHeader
WriteCompilerDetectionHeader.description: This module provides a command to generate header with preprocessor macros.
